titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD55/225

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=497 status=draft modified=2022-11-01 17:01:18.16893+00 | translation moa=498 status=draft modified=2016-08-10 15:30:30.933654+00

div.p:
Vniuersis christi fidelibus hoc scriptum uisuris uel audituris . A . rector ecclesie de Balinclog salutem . Nouerit
uniuersitas uestra quod cum Monachi de Melros terram suam de Barmor secularibus ad firmam tradiderint
usque ad finem decem annorum et ecclesie mee de Balinclog decime eiusdem territorii tempore firme con
petant de iure communi  ego ob causam legittimam et dicte ecclesie mee necessariam uendidi prefatis
monachis omnes decimas ex predicto territorio prouenientes usque ad finem decem annorum pro certa summa
pecunie quam mihi idem Monachi simul et semel soluerunt . Conuenit etiam inter nos quod post fi
nem dictorum decem annorum quotiens dictam terram . . . ad firmam dabunt idem Monachi unam
marcam argenti mihi et ecclesie mee singuli annis . . . percipient integre omnes de
cimas meas prouenientes tantum . Actum anno gracie milesimo . ducentesimo . viginti sexto .
To all Christ's faithful who shall see or hear this text, A., rector of the church of Balinclog sends greeting. Let you whole community know that since the monks of Melrose
